concerns.text: Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) requires Reference-Validator Agent citation verification workflow, but no task implements or verifies this workflow. Plan claims 'PASS' without corresponding task coverage.

Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) requires seed pinning throughout code/, but no audit task verifies comprehensive seed pinning across all code paths. T014a/T016a/T025 cover specific modules only.

Constitution Principle VII (Statistical Rigor) requires effect sizes and confidence intervals for all statistical outputs, but no verification task ensures all correlation and regression outputs include these metrics.
FR-006 requires fixed-effects regression, but T040 implements OLS regression with only documentation of deviation (T040a). No task addresses the spec requirement directly.
FR-005 requires 'all pairwise correlations between all metric pairs', but T039a explicitly excludes DP-difference vs DI-ratio pairs. No task implements the full FR-005 requirement.
